query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_network_members (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractorId INT NOT NULL,
  membershipTier ENUM('basic', 'professional', 'enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'basic',
  monthlyFee DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  referralFeePercentage DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10.00,
  joinedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'suspended', 'cancelled', 'pending') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  benefitsEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  groupInsuranceEnrolled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  retirementPlanEnrolled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  preferredVendorStatus BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  parentContractorId INT,
  networkLevel INT DEFAULT 1,
  totalReferralsPaid DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  totalRevenueGenerated DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  lastPaymentDate DATE,
  nextPaymentDue DATE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_network_members (

  contractorId INT NOT NULL,
  membershipTier ENUM('basic', 'professional', 'enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'basic',
  monthlyFee DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  referralFeePercentage DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10.00,
  joinedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'suspended', 'cancelled', 'pending') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  benefitsEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  groupInsuranceEnrolled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  retirementPlanEnrolled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  preferredVendorStatus BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  parentContractorId INT,
  networkLevel INT DEFAULT 1,
  totalReferralsPaid DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  totalRevenueGenerated DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  lastPaymentDate DATE,
  nextPaymentDue DATE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
